extensionDescription.message: Ithibele litšokelo tsa inthaneteng ka nako ea sebele u sebelisa bafani ba ts'ireletso ea libatli tse ngata.

warningTitle.message: Tlhokomeliso: Webosaete ena ha e bolokehe

recommendation.message: Osprey e thibile phihlello ho webosaete ena. Ha ho bolokehe ho tsoela pele.

details.message: Haeba u mong'a webosaete ena, ka kopo ikopanye le mofani oa tšireletso ho rarolla bothata.

reportWebsite.message: Tlaleha webosaete ena e le e bolokehileng

continueButton.message: Tsoela pele leha ho le joalo

knownSafe.message: E Tsejoa e le e Bolokehileng

clearAllowedWebsitesContext.message: Hlakola lethathamo la liwebosaete tse lumelletsoeng

clearAllowedWebsitesMessage.message: Liwebosaete tsohle tse lumelletsoeng li hlakotsoe.

reportWebsiteAsMaliciousContext.message: Tlaleha sebaka sa marang-rang e le se kotsi

unsafeWebsiteTitle.message: Webosaete e sa Sireletsehang e Thibetsoe
